fields.title: skill-manage: SkillManager Effect service
fields.description: Plan: docs/plans/2026-03-27-agentic-skill-creation.md — Task 3. Create services/skill-manager.ts — ServiceMap.Service with create/edit/patch/remove/writeFile/removeFile. Atomic writes, frontmatter validation, injection checking. Accepts onSkillMutated callback.
fields.notes: Implemented extensions/tau/src/services/skill-manager.ts with create/edit/patch/remove/writeFile/removeFile, recursive skill discovery, atomic writes, validation/security checks, and mutation callback wiring. Verification: cd extensions/tau && npx tsc --noEmit exits 0; cd extensions/tau && npm run gate passes with lint clean and 146/146 tests.
